opinion.h4: SHELDON ET AL. v. FANNIN ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE DISTRICT OF ARIZONA. No. 656. Decided February 18, 1963.
opinion.p: Robert W. Pickrell, Attorney General of Arizona, and Frank Sagarino, Assistant Attorney General, for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed.
